channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bin overflowing, 23rd April
item.description:
Bin is overflowing and dog poo bags on floor right by the entrance to school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairford Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light cover off, 23rd April
item.description:
Outside Laurence house street light has cover off and wires exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catford Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: ///royal.early.drag flytipping and litter, 23rd April
item.description:
Fly tipped lamp and litter all around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Pleydell Avenue, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Tags on Viaduct Big Sign, 23rd April
item.description:
Tags on Viaduct Big Sign Location: 51.46254408391264, -0.11006128288641753

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Number 18 Badgers Croft has a heap of household waste piled in their front garden and a fridge on the public path that has been there for weeks. This is attracting vermin and foxes and when it gets windy the litter blows into my garden and I have to keep picking it up. It’s disgusting, 23rd April
item.description:
Please see above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Badgers Croft, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged kerb / pavement o/s 81 Sutherland Ave, 23rd April
item.description:
The kerb stone and pavement by the vehicle crossover have been damaged after a road traffic accident. Please can this be looked into with a matter of urgency as the kerb stone is sticking up by about 15 cms.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No cover on street light, 23rd April
item.description:
Potential risk of electric shock/death, vandalism/theft of supply

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catford Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The car has been there ages, it has grafitti on is damaged, 23rd April
item.description:
Grafitti, damaged to front and back and hasn't been moved in weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watergate Street, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish in front of building, 23rd April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish including christmas tree. please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Wharf Road, Hoxton, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd April
item.description:
O/s 64 Oakways - looks like the residents have moved out and left it behind
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oakways, Eltham

item.title: To the left of the opening from Shell Close, 23rd April
item.description:
Their are 2 Homeless people living there making a mess dumping rubbish on the field they have been there for a while now so hopefully this matter will be resolved quickly
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broom Close, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Elsted Street Shared Use Bay Sign Sprayed, 23rd April
item.description:
The shared use parking sign on the lamp post on Larissa street (the pedestrian walkway between The Huntsman & Hounds and 76 Elsted Street) has been sprayed over.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laressa Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside honest burgers, 23rd April
item.description:
Abandoned bicycles taking up spaces. Could we have the abandoned bikes removed + ideally more racks installed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tottenham Court Road, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raw sewage overflowing from manhole, 23rd April
item.description:
This morning I noticed the waste water - it really smells. Looks like it overflowed onto the path and into the river.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Notice Boards, 23rd April
item.description:
The notice boards in Townsend House need various information notes updated. EG Christopher Babutunde has been replaced by Ms Eze!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Strathnairn Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish fly tipped, 23rd April
item.description:
Tipped over night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earlswood Street, Greenwich
